cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out the answer to this question. The question is asking what the visitor's main purpose was when he came to John's house. The options are: (A) steal something, (B) read the story, (C) have a drink, or (D) visit the writer. First, I'll go through the story again to make sure I understand the details. John is a writer who couldn't finish his story, so he went to the cinema. When he came back, he found that someone had broken into his house. The intruder had a drink, smoked his cigarettes, read his story, and left a note. The note said the thief didn't steal anything that night but would return if John became successful. John followed the thief's suggestions and finished the story. Now he leaves
